reviews.author: Mariana
reviews.text: Totally skippable if short of time. But if you are in the area and not in a hurry, it’s peaceful and pleasant to chill a bit. The cave was open and pretty nice, no additional charge (Saturday) The entrance fee 30k per person

reviews.author: zio parco
reviews.text: Hồ Thang Hen is incredibly beautiful and peaceful, a quiet spot surrounded by lush mountains where you can really breathe and slow down. Definitely worth the trip.

reviews.author: Razz nsus
reviews.text: It’s a nice lake when the water level is low , so that as the pictures everywhere comes true. But it’s August last we went there , nothing special . Entrance ticket is worthless. Just a lake quite dirty and no western style toilet. But good part is , many colorful fish could be seen. Fire place out space was there and a very popular soft tennis kinda game court was located.

reviews.author: sophie fewkes
reviews.text: 30k entrance fee was fine as I visited the small caves accessible by the road. Aside from that, it was pretty quiet and some buildings were locked up and uncared for. I visited to fill some time but wouldn’t bother otherwise.

reviews.author: Georgia Mudd
reviews.text: We stayed at the homestay here, the rooms were really clean and comfortable and the staff were really friendly. The homestay feels so quiet, we saw no other guests. The food was also really good :) However, we needed some basic first aid supplies which they didn’t have which seemed crazy given the location and size of the homestay, but this had nothing to do with our stay which was great :)

reviews.author: Zachary Fair
reviews.text: Charged us 30,000 each to enter, which feels like a scam since the place looks abandoned. Cave temple closed/locked... Asked about room/dinner and I think they wanted 300-350k per person. I CAN'T FIND ANY REASON TO VISIT HERE... Maybe drive out to see the locals in the villages along the way. Pic below of really cool home stay 10min from main road, which is 10 minutes from this lake. Search agoda. Was like 100k room, 50k breakfast and 100k dinner. Could be sold out if group booked through trip advisor, but we showed up and group allowed us to join them. Pics of lake and homestay. Look for high reviews on agoda once you get to main street/village from this lake if interested in home stay. In traditional farming village. Mr khem is his name.

reviews.author: Duc Minh Ngo
reviews.text: A lake within a valley with great view. We can trek around the lake and explore the small caves around.

reviews.author: Nickk
reviews.text: Nice relaxing spot during low season. Sit.back and have coffee and walk around the lake

reviews.author: Oliver Day
reviews.text: Picturesque lake near Cao Bang Vietnam - well worth a visit for a quieter dip into nature. The trail does not go the whole way round but there is a couple of little caves worth a look. It's off the beaten track and cost 30000 Dong to visit. I didn't notice any of the fossils it is famed for but enjoyed it nonetheless.

reviews.author: Alexander Flensburg
reviews.text: Cpmletely Deserted when I went there, only a security guard collecting entrance fee (around 10k dong I think). Not worth the trip in my book if you are a bit short on time. But if it is on your way go for it!

reviews.author: Wilson Yap
reviews.text: This is a local picnic place not worth the 20kvnd to come in. U can spend ur time at the valleys and maize fields instead. Right at the beginning of the small road, follow the path to the Angel Eye.

reviews.author: Lê Thị Bích Lệ
reviews.text: The most stunning nature lake in Cao Bang

reviews.author: ilona
reviews.text: It’s OK but not that much worth a visit. Ticket to enter 30.000 dong

reviews.author: Nguyen Hoang Anh
reviews.text: Beautiful lake, blue water, between the two mountains

reviews.author: Benny Levinger
reviews.text: Amazing in the rainy season, but really unworthy for price and service in the dry one.

reviews.author: JAI SINGH
reviews.text: A quiet place to relax and have some coffee

reviews.author: Julia Davigora
reviews.text: The lake is impressive but you can’t swim there.

reviews.author: van linh Nguyen
reviews.text: From Novenber, I think you should not visit so don’t has anything enjoy.

reviews.author: Tram Khang
reviews.text: Mình đến vào giữa tháng 9/2025. Giá vé 30k/người. Hồ nước xanh rất đẹp, có nuôi cá koi dưới hồ. Có homestay nghỉ lại nhưng thấy khá vắng. Nếu ở đây ban đêm chắc buồn lắm. Cảnh vật xung quanh rất trong lành và yên bình. Nhưng không có nhiều hoạt động trải nghiệm. Hình như có chèo sup hoặc đi thuyền ra hồ. Nếu đến đây thì khách có thể kết hợp tham quan Núi mắt thần ở gần đó, chạy tầm 4km là đến.

reviews.author: SDC BNI Thao Le (Thao Le)
reviews.text: Sau bão 2025 trông hoang tàn thê thảm. Hy vọng địa điểm nhanh chóng lấy lại được vẻ đẹp của nơi đây

reviews.author: Xuân Phạm
reviews.text: Rất nên đến, cảnh đẹp, check in lên hình cũng siêu đẹp ạ, đi chơichỉ cần có thế. Có đầy đủ dv ăn uống.. khi cần nữa. Hồ nước rộng trong xanh có cả dv chèo thuyền đi dạo nữa nè.

reviews.author: Mirjam van de Weijer
reviews.text: Leuk meer maar niet heel speciaal. Fijne sfeer. Entree 30 K is rijkelijk veel. Grot aan de andere kant van het meer is wel de moeite van het bekijken waard.

reviews.author: Toan cận
reviews.text: yên tĩnh, sạch nhiều cây xanh phục vụ niềm nở chu đáo món ăn ngon

reviews.author: Phương Minh Nguyễn
reviews.text: Vé 30k/ người. Cảnh ở đây còn rất hoang sơ, mây mờ che phủ. Ngày mình cùng gia đình tới đây là 1 ngày đẹp trời, sương mù sà xuống, trông rất đẹp, phù hợp để sống ảo, hồ nước rất xanh, có cả cá Koi. Xứng đáng để tới check in khi bạn tới Cao Bằng

reviews.author: Lily SKS
reviews.text: Vé 30k/ người Cảnh ở đây còn rất hoang sơ, mây mờ che phủ Ngày mình cùng nhóm tới đây là 1 ngày đẹp trời, sương mù sà xuống, trông rất đẹp, phù hợp để sống ảo, Có quán cafe với view ngồi nhìn thẳng ra hồ, quán khá chill, Xứng đáng để tới check in khi bạn tới Cao Bằng

reviews.author: Vivian Pham
reviews.text: Nước hồ trong xanh, nhiều góc checkin chụp hình nhé

reviews.author: Quỳnh Anh
reviews.text: Hồ nước đẹp xanh ngọc bích. Vé vào là 30k, mình có ghé quán cf ở đây. Đồ uống ngon rẻ từ 30-40k thuii. Đi ngày nắng màu nước óng ánh đẹp tuyệt

reviews.author: Thắng Trần
reviews.text: Vé vào cổng 30 k mà không có gì để tham quan! Phía trong chỉ toàn quán cà phê và ăn uống! Không nên đi vào mùa từ tháng 3 đến tháng 8

reviews.author: Dương Văn Quốc
reviews.text: Vào thời gian này, hồ ít nước đến trơ cả đáy. Vé tham quan 30k/người trở thành vô duyên
